# Ganhuo Travel Lock

Chinese-first Codex Skill for practical summer travel, family trips, graduation trips, live price verification, hotel/transport/ticket comparison, and conversational itinerary lock-in.

Repository: https://github.com/yuanyuanyuan430/ganhuo-travel-lock

Core files:

- [Skill instructions](SKILL.md)
- [Booking lock-in workflow](references/booking-lockin-workflow.md)
- [Price verification workflow](references/price-verification-workflow.md)
- [Travel guide template](references/travel-guide-template.md)
- [Self-check script](scripts/check_ganhuo_travel_lock.py)

Use this skill when the user asks in Chinese about:

- 旅游攻略
- 暑假去哪
- 带娃旅游 / 亲子游
- 毕业旅行
- 城市推荐
- 热门地点避坑
- 小红书旅行攻略
- 订票 / 查票价 / 比价
- 酒店价格
- 高铁/机票班次
- 门票预约
- 锁定行程

Important boundaries:

- Do not fabricate real-time prices, opening hours, availability, schedules, reservation slots, or queue times.
- Do not auto-submit orders or payments.
- Do not store credentials, identity documents, payment details, cookies, or verification codes.
- Do not bypass captchas, queues, anti-bot systems, login walls, or rate limits.
- Stop before paid or irreversible actions and require explicit user confirmation.
